requirement_topic.en: Grid Connection Standard — AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 New Zealand Setting
requirement_topic.zh: 并网标准——AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 新西兰设置
requirement_topic.zht: 併網標準——AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 紐西蘭設定

summary.en: Grid-connected PV inverters for New Zealand must comply with AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 inverter requirements and be configured for the New Zealand region profile, not an Australian A/B/C profile and not China factory grid settings. The wider installation must also be designed and installed under the Electricity (Safety) Regulations 2010, AS/NZS 3000 wiring rules, AS/NZS 5033 PV-array requirements, and the local distributor connection standard.
summary.zh: 面向新西兰的并网光伏逆变器须符合 AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 逆变器要求，并配置为新西兰区域参数，而非澳大利亚 A/B/C 区域参数，也非中国出厂电网参数。整体安装还须依据《2010年电气（安全）条例》、AS/NZS 3000 布线规则、AS/NZS 5033 光伏阵列要求及当地配电商并网标准设计和施工。
summary.zht: 面向紐西蘭的併網光伏逆變器須符合 AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 逆變器要求，並配置為紐西蘭區域參數，而非澳洲 A/B/C 區域參數，也非中國出廠電網參數。整體安裝還須依據《2010年電氣（安全）規例》、AS/NZS 3000 佈線規則、AS/NZS 5033 光伏陣列要求及當地配電商併網標準設計和施工。

standards_or_laws: AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 — Grid connection of energy systems via inverters, Part 2: Inverter requirements
AS/NZS 5033 — Installation and safety requirements for photovoltaic arrays

summary.en: China-side grid evidence commonly cites GB/T 37408-2021 or earlier GB/T 37408 editions for inverter testing, NB/T 32004 for grid-connected PV inverter technical specifications, and GB/T 19964-2024 for PV power-station grid connection. These standards are calibrated to China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz grid and Chinese protection settings.
summary.zh: 中国侧并网证明通常引用 GB/T 37408-2021 或早期 GB/T 37408 版本的逆变器检测要求、NB/T 32004 光伏并网逆变器技术规范，以及 GB/T 19964-2024 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定。这些标准按中国 220/380 V、50 Hz 电网和中国保护参数校准。
summary.zht: 中國側併網證明通常引用 GB/T 37408-2021 或早期 GB/T 37408 版本的逆變器檢測要求、NB/T 32004 光伏併網逆變器技術規範，以及 GB/T 19964-2024 光伏發電站接入電力系統技術規定。這些標準按中國 220/380 V、50 Hz 電網和中國保護參數校準。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — Technical requirements / testing for photovoltaic grid-connected inverters
NB/T 32004 — Technical specification for photovoltaic grid-connected inverter
GB/T 19964-2024 — Technical requirements for photovoltaic power station connected to power system

gap.en: Chinese GB/T and NB/T reports do not prove AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 New Zealand-region compliance. Firmware must expose and lock the New Zealand profile, protection limits must be tested to AS/NZS 4777.2, and the product must be marked and documented for New Zealand's 230/400 V, 50 Hz supply. A China default setting of 220/380 V is not suitable evidence for NZ connection approval.
gap.zh: 中国 GB/T 和 NB/T 报告不能证明符合 AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 新西兰区域要求。固件必须提供并锁定新西兰配置文件，保护限值须按 AS/NZS 4777.2 测试，产品标识和文件须适用于新西兰 230/400 V、50 Hz 供电。中国默认 220/380 V 设置不能作为新西兰并网批准的充分证明。
gap.zht: 中國 GB/T 和 NB/T 報告不能證明符合 AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 紐西蘭區域要求。韌體必須提供並鎖定紐西蘭設定檔，保護限值須按 AS/NZS 4777.2 測試，產品標識和文件須適用於紐西蘭 230/400 V、50 Hz 供電。中國默認 220/380 V 設定不能作為紐西蘭併網批准的充分證明。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid connection — AS/NZS 4777.2 compliance and New Zealand region settings are required by distributor connection standards and electrical-safety practice
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or de facto required for China domestic grid connection; not accepted as New Zealand evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 New Zealand-region testing and firmware evidence as a separate requirement. Chinese GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, or GB/T 19964 evidence may help engineering review but does not authorise NZ grid connection.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将 AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 新西兰区域测试和固件证明视为独立要求。中国 GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004 或 GB/T 19964 证明可辅助工程审查，但不能授权在新西兰并网。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將 AS/NZS 4777.2:2020 紐西蘭區域測試和韌體證明視為獨立要求。中國 GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004 或 GB/T 19964 證明可輔助工程審查，但不能授權在紐西蘭併網。

requirement_topic.en: Distributed Generation Connection Approval — Electricity Authority Part 6 and Local Lines Company
requirement_topic.zh: 分布式发电并网批准——电力管理局 Part 6 与当地线路公司
requirement_topic.zht: 分散式發電併網批准——電力管理局 Part 6 與當地線路公司

summary.en: New Zealand distributed PV generation connects to local distribution networks, not directly through a national CEC-style product listing. Part 6 of the Electricity Industry Participation Code mandates the application and approval process between the prospective generator and the distributor or lines company. Examples include Vector, Powerco, Orion, Wellington Electricity, and other local network operators.
summary.zh: 新西兰分布式光伏发电接入当地配电网络，而不是通过全国性 CEC 式产品名单直接批准。Electricity Industry Participation Code 第 6 部分规定拟发电方与配电商/线路公司之间的申请和批准流程。例如 Vector、Powerco、Orion、Wellington Electricity 及其他当地网络运营商。
summary.zht: 紐西蘭分散式光伏發電接入當地配電網絡，而不是通過全國性 CEC 式產品名單直接批准。Electricity Industry Participation Code 第 6 部分規定擬發電方與配電商/線路公司之間的申請和批准流程。例如 Vector、Powerco、Orion、Wellington Electricity 及其他當地網絡營運商。

standards_or_laws: Electricity Industry Participation Code 2010, Part 6 — Connection of distributed generation
Electricity Authority guidelines for small-scale distributed generation
Local distributor / lines company connection standards and approval forms

summary.en: China grid connection is normally handled through domestic grid companies under Chinese national and industry standards. That domestic utility process does not map to New Zealand's Part 6 application process, which is project- and distributor-specific.
summary.zh: 中国并网通常由国内电网公司依据中国国家和行业标准办理。该国内电网公司流程不等同于新西兰 Part 6 申请流程；新西兰流程按项目和配电商逐项处理。
summary.zht: 中國併網通常由國內電網公司依據中國國家和行業標準辦理。該國內電網公司流程不等同於紐西蘭 Part 6 申請流程；紐西蘭流程按項目和配電商逐項處理。

standards_or_laws: Local State Grid / China Southern Power Grid interconnection process

gap.en: Even a technically compliant inverter still needs connection approval from the relevant New Zealand distributor for the site. Evidence expected by the distributor can include AS/NZS 4777.2 compliance, NZ region settings, export limits, protection settings, installer declarations, and system design documents. Chinese domestic grid-connection approval is not transferable.
gap.zh: 即使逆变器技术上合规，具体项目仍须取得相关新西兰配电商的并网批准。配电商可能要求 AS/NZS 4777.2 合规、新西兰区域设置、馈网限制、保护参数、安装方声明和系统设计文件。中国国内并网批准不可转移使用。
gap.zht: 即使逆變器技術上合規，具體項目仍須取得相關紐西蘭配電商的併網批准。配電商可能要求 AS/NZS 4777.2 合規、紐西蘭區域設定、饋網限制、保護參數、安裝方聲明和系統設計文件。中國國內併網批准不可轉移使用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — distributor approval is required under the Part 6 connection process before distributed generation is connected
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — China domestic utility approval does not replace NZ distributor approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] There is no national NZ approved-inverter list equivalent to Australia's CEC list. Confirm AS/NZS 4777.2 evidence and submit the site-specific connection application to the local lines company under Part 6.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 新西兰没有等同于澳大利亚 CEC 的全国认可逆变器名单。应确认 AS/NZS 4777.2 证明，并按 Part 6 向当地线路公司提交具体项目并网申请。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 紐西蘭沒有等同於澳洲 CEC 的全國認可逆變器名單。應確認 AS/NZS 4777.2 證明，並按 Part 6 向當地線路公司提交具體項目併網申請。

requirement_topic.en: Supply Voltage and Product Marking — 230/400 V, 50 Hz
requirement_topic.zh: 供电电压与产品标识——230/400 V，50 Hz
requirement_topic.zht: 供電電壓與產品標識——230/400 V，50 Hz

summary.en: WorkSafe guidance states that domestic and similar electrical and electronic products cannot be sold in New Zealand unless rated and marked for the standard New Zealand mains supply of 230 V single phase or 400 V multiphase, 50 Hz. PV inverters intended for household or similar installations should therefore carry NZ-compatible voltage/frequency ratings and installation instructions.
summary.zh: WorkSafe 指引说明，家用及类似用途电气和电子产品，除非额定并标识为适用于新西兰标准市电 230 V 单相或 400 V 多相、50 Hz，否则不得在新西兰销售。因此用于住宅或类似安装的光伏逆变器应具备适用于新西兰的电压/频率额定值和安装说明。
summary.zht: WorkSafe 指引說明，家用及類似用途電氣和電子產品，除非額定並標識為適用於紐西蘭標準市電 230 V 單相或 400 V 多相、50 Hz，否則不得在紐西蘭銷售。因此用於住宅或類似安裝的光伏逆變器應具備適用於紐西蘭的電壓/頻率額定值和安裝說明。

standards_or_laws: WorkSafe electrical product compliance guidance — 230 V / 400 V, 50 Hz marking

summary.en: Chinese domestic inverter labels and manuals often reference 220/380 V, 50 Hz settings and Chinese protection values. That rating may be close electrically, but it is not the required New Zealand product marking or commissioning evidence.
summary.zh: 中国国内逆变器标签和说明书通常引用 220/380 V、50 Hz 设置及中国保护值。该额定值在电气上接近，但不是新西兰所需的产品标识或调试证明。
summary.zht: 中國國內逆變器標籤和說明書通常引用 220/380 V、50 Hz 設定及中國保護值。該額定值在電氣上接近，但不是紐西蘭所需的產品標識或調試證明。

standards_or_laws: China nominal low-voltage supply — 220/380 V, 50 Hz

gap.en: A product shipped only with 220/380 V China marking and China grid settings creates a labelling and commissioning gap for New Zealand. Correct NZ rating marks, English instructions, and NZ-region commissioning records should be prepared before supply or installation.
gap.zh: 仅带 220/380 V 中国标识和中国电网设置出货的产品，在新西兰存在标识和调试差距。供应或安装前应准备正确的新西兰额定标识、英文说明书和新西兰区域调试记录。
gap.zht: 僅帶 220/380 V 中國標識和中國電網設定出貨的產品，在紐西蘭存在標識和調試差距。供應或安裝前應準備正確的紐西蘭額定標識、英文說明書和紐西蘭區域調試記錄。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for domestic and similar products — New Zealand standard mains rating and safe-use information are required before sale
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic marking does not satisfy NZ marking requirements

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on 220/380 V China labels or default firmware for NZ. Confirm the inverter is rated, marked, documented, and commissioned for New Zealand's 230/400 V, 50 Hz system.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应依赖 220/380 V 中国标签或默认固件用于新西兰。应确认逆变器已按新西兰 230/400 V、50 Hz 系统进行额定、标识、文件和调试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應依賴 220/380 V 中國標籤或默認韌體用於紐西蘭。應確認逆變器已按紐西蘭 230/400 V、50 Hz 系統進行額定、標識、文件和調試。
